name: golang-boost
description: Single-entry, grouped-index Claude Code skill for github.com/xgodev/boost. skills/boost/SKILL.md lists 8 top-level contexts (boot sequence, model/errors, contributing, wrapper, bootstrap, extra, fx, factory); wrapper/bootstrap/extra/fx/factory each expand into their own context file, and factory further splits into 5 domain files (database, messaging, http, observability, infra) before reaching a per-component leaf. Only the small top-level SKILL.md loads on every trigger — every deeper file loads only when the question actually needs it.
